name: ohmycodex
description: A complete engineering workflow for AI-assisted MVPs in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Plan, build, verify, review, and release AI-assisted products with persistent project context and practical engineering guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Use $omc-orchestrator to turn my app idea into a buildable MVP.
Use $omc-review to audit this AI-generated codebase.
Use $omc-release to prepare this project for a safe release.
